---
title: "Tree 63 - European ash"
toc: false
---

![Tree 63 - European ash in the Nature Discovery Garden (28/09/2025)](/assets/images/trees/tree63.jpg)

{{< include /assets/tree-species-info/european-ash.md >}}

## Tree data

**Planted:** Wildlife Garden (1994?)

**Diameter at breast height (1.2m):** 21.9 cm (28/09/2025)
